intro: The Artanthe colubrina, also known as the snake vine, is a climbing plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in wound healing and the treatment of various infections.
